title: Big Extras
description: This mod adds extra changes that aims to improve the vanilla experience of Minecraft that were too Big for the Mini Extras Mod.
body:
## What's this mod about? ##
This mod adds extra changes that aims to improve the vanilla experience of Minecraft that were too Big for the [Mini Extras Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mini-extras).

Next you can check all the contents and on the wiki theres info about each one.
Everything here can be enabled / disable in the config file.

## Contents ##
**1.0**
- [Beacon Flight](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#beacon-flight)
- [Endless Rod](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#endless-rod)
 -[Mover and Mover Wand](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#mover-and-mover-wand)
- [Slimier](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#slimier)
- [Ice Trapdoor](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#ice-trapdoor)
- [Invisible, Invisible (Entities) and Invisible (Nothing)](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#invisible-invisible-entities-and-invisible-nothing)
- [Underwater Torch](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#underwater-torch)
- [Underwater Campfire](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#underwater-campfire)
- [Extra Sands](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#black-and-white-sand)

**1.5.2**
- [Netherite Bow](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#netherite-bow)

**1.6.0**
- [More Extra Sands](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#extra-sands)
- [Extra Tinted Glass](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#extra-tinted-glass)

**1.8.0**
- [Netherite Crossbow](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki#netherite-crossbow)
 

## FAQ ##
**Where can I find the recipes?**

[Here.](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/wiki)

**I have a bug/suggestion!**

[Post it here.](https://github.com/iamshift/BigExtras/issues)

**I want to use this in my modpack.**

Feel free to do it.
